Tanay Wind Power Project                     Wind        Alternergy Tanay Wind Corporation           Antipolo City and Tanay, Rizal             Rizal        IV-A       128.000            Jan-26               Mar-26         38% - Civil construction and WTG installations

                                                                                                                                                                                                                               25% - Interconnection Facilities
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Some development activities of the Talim Wind Power Project have encountered delays due to the
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               COVID19 pandemic. Transactions with government agencies have been limited because of frequent
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               closures due to disinfections. Travels for data gathering and field validations have also been limited due to
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               community quarantine implementations.

Caparispisan II Wind Power Project           Wind         Amihan Renewable Energy Corp.                 Pagudpud, Ilocos Norte               Ilocos Norte     I          70.000            Mar-25               Jul-26

                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Completed field test under the Grid Compliance Test on March 5-7 and currently undergoing Power Quality
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Analysis/Test
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Under GEA-2 (Offered capacity of 80.000MW);
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Under Pre-Development Stage

                                                                                                                                                                                                                               On 19 September 2024, the assignment of WESC from Citicore Wind Energy Corporation (CWEC) to
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Citicore Wind Pangasinan 2 Inc. (CWP2I) was approved;

                                                                                                                                                                                                                               On 24 January 2025, the assignment of the Green Energy Auction (GEA) Certificate of Award (COA) No.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               GEA2-W2023-10-006 from CWEC to CWP2I was approved.

Pangasinan CW 2 Wind Power Project           Wind         Citicore Wind Energy Corporation          Sual and Labrador, Pangasinan            Pangasinan       I          80.000            Jun-26               Jul-26         Issues and concerns :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               - The requested connection point to NGCP is the Bolo 230kV Substation (SS).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               - Per NGCP' Offer of Service for System Impact Study (OOS-SIS) rejected the requested connection point
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               due to limited available termination.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               - NGCP instead recommended connection at the Bugallon 230kV SS which is still under construction and
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               will be completed by 2031 (for validation).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               - The DCD of the Project is December 2026 and connection at Bugallon SS will entail 9km TL.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               - Delayed in the acqusition of Special Land Use Permit with the DENR

                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Grant of 3year extension of DCD effective from the date the force majeure event cease to exist
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               100% Completed construction

                                                                                                                                                                                                                               With PCATC and completed T & C

Notes:
TBD - To be determined
Renewable Energy (RE) Projects (Geothermal, Hydro, Biomass, Solar, and Wind) are updated as of 31 December 2025
IRESS - Integrated Renewable Energy and Energy Storage System

For inquiries, please contact the following:
DOE Electric Power Industry Management Bureau (EPIMB) for non-RE projects (coal, oil, natural gas,and BESS) - doe.epimb.powerprojects@gmail.com
DOE Renewable Energy Management Bureau (REMB) for RE Projects - remb9513@doe.gov.ph
